description: 10 percent off at BigBasket for a limited time when paid with the HDFC Millennia Credit Card
Bonus EDGE Reward points on IndiGo bookings made through the Axis EDGE Rewards travel portal with the Axis Bank Magnus Credit Card
Extra 5 percent cashback on Amazon.in purchases for a limited time with the ICICI Amazon Pay Credit Card
Accelerated SmartBuy Reward points on MakeMyTrip flight and hotel bookings with the HDFC Infinia Credit Card, capped at 15000 points a month
10 percent instant discount on Myntra when paid with the SBI Cashback Credit Card, on a minimum spend of Rs 999
Buy one get one free movie ticket up to Rs 125, twice a month, on the District by Zomato app with the IDFC FIRST Select Credit Card, on a minimum spend of Rs 20000 in the previous month
